name: Construction ladder fall in Boise, GC or employer pays?
description: Comp from employer + sue GC for more.

mainEntity.name: Construction ladder fall in Boise, GC or employer pays?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp from employer + sue GC for more.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Employer comp first; sue GC** if their negligence (no safety gear).[3][4]

Idaho allows both tracks.

- Prove GC control.
- Comp reimburses from suit.

Specialist lawyers coordinate.
